content: Unresolved: Is intentional a new project that imports shoe-makers as a library (adapting its behaviour tree), or a standalone project that borrows patterns? Also: should the triage skill be built in intentional first, or added to shoe-makers?

provenance.raw_agent: So the question is: is intentional a new project that imports shoe-makers as a library, adapting its behaviour tree — or are we building something standalone that borrows the patterns?
provenance.raw_user: we have octowiki and we have a model for behaviour tree in my repo ../shoemakers (maybe hyphenated)
